partial_progress.details: Phase 1 complete (boundary_resolution_set defined). Phase 2 partial: key lemmas proven (neg_not_in_*), but augmented_seed_consistent has 1 sorry for the main consistency argument. Phases 3-5 not started.
partial_progress.blocker: The consistency proof requires showing that chi.neg is not derivable from old_seed. The key lemmas proving chi.neg is not directly IN old_seed are complete, but proving non-derivability requires deeper analysis of modal logic derivability.

verification.build_output: Pre-existing build errors unrelated to task 48 changes

review_reason: Phase 2 consistency proof is blocked. The approach in plan v9 may need revision. Consider: (1) Alternative consistency argument using semantic reasoning, (2) Strengthening boundary_resolution_set conditions, (3) Different seed construction approach.
